description_en: Large votive ema dedicated by Hirata Atsutane is a historical artifact in Koshigaya City. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property. It is located at Koshigaya 1700 (Hisaizu Shrine).

description_en: Memorial gravestone for the poet Koshigaya Gozan is a historical artifact in Koshigaya City. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property. It is located at Koshigaya 2549 (Tengokuji Temple).

description_en: Monument commemorating relief of the destitute is a historical artifact in Koshigaya City. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property. It is located at Kawarasone 1-5-43 (Shōrenin Temple).

description_en: Tutelary-shrine festival ledger of Koshimaki-Nakashinden is a historical artifact in Koshigaya City. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property. It is located at Shinkawa-chō (private collection).

description_en: Materials relating to the Koshigaya Junseikai society is a historical artifact in Koshigaya City. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property. It is located at Koshigaya 4-2-1 (Koshigaya City Hall).

description_en: Lifting stones inscribed with the name of Sannomiya Unosuke is a historical artifact in Koshigaya City. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property. It is located at Sannomiya 333 (Katori Shrine), Koshigaya 1700 (Hisaizu Shrine), and elsewhere.

name_romaji: Aoi Me no Ningyō (Tsuketari Pasupōto Hoka)
name_en: 'Blue-eyed doll' (with passport and related items)
description_en: 'Blue-eyed doll' (with passport and related items) is a historical artifact in Koshigaya City. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property. It is located at Ōsawa 2-13-21 (Ōsawa Elementary School) and Ōtake 147 (Ōbukuro Elementary School).

description_en: Monument commemorating flood control at Kawarasone Reservoir is a historical artifact in Koshigaya City. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property. It is located at Sagami-chō 1-chōme (Yakota Riverside Greenway Spot Plaza).

description_en: The Koshigaya meteorite is a historical artifact in Koshigaya City. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property. It is located at Ōsato (private collection).

description_en: Mathematical votive tablet (sangaku) of Dairokuten is a tangible folk-cultural item in Koshigaya City. It is a municipally designated folk cultural property. It is located at Shimo-Maguri (private collection).

description_en: Votive ema depicting a fair-day scene at the Kannon Hall is a tangible folk-cultural item in Koshigaya City. It is a municipally designated folk cultural property. It is located at Ōdomari 104 (Ōdomari Kannon Hall).

description_en: Kiyari work songs of Koshigaya is an intangible folk-cultural tradition in Koshigaya City. It is a municipally designated folk cultural property. It is located at the Koshigaya area.

description_en: Float procession of the grand festival of Koshigaya Hisaizu Shrine (Koshigaya Autumn Festival) is an intangible folk-cultural tradition in Koshigaya City. It is a municipally designated folk cultural property. It is located at Koshigaya-Honchō, Nakachō, Koshigaya 1-3-chōme, Yayoi-chō and other districts in Koshigaya City.

description_en: Mitagata archaeological site is a historic site in Koshigaya City. It is a municipally designated monument. It is located at around Mitagata Site Park.

description_en: Ginkgo tree of the Nakamura family is a natural monument in Koshigaya City. It is a municipally designated monument. It is located at Higashi-Koshigaya (private collection).

description_en: Camphor tree (kusunoki) of the Nakamura family is a natural monument in Koshigaya City. It is a municipally designated monument. It is located at Ōnari-chō (private collection).
